nasb.text: So they took all the men and went to fight with Ishmael the son of Nethaniah and they found him by the great pool that is in Gibeon.

esv.text: they took all their men and went to fight against Ishmael the son of Nethaniah. They came upon him at the great pool that is in Gibeon.

cnv.text: 就率領所有的人，去攻打尼探雅的兒子以實瑪利，在基遍的大水池邊追上他。

ccb.text: 便率领部下去攻打他，在基遍的大水池边追上了他。
